title: Meteomatics Weather API Response
description: JSON Schema for the standard weather data response from the Meteomatics Weather API (format=json).

user.description: Username associated with the API request.

dateGenerated.description: UTC timestamp when the response was generated.

data.description: Array of weather parameter result objects — one per requested parameter.

ParameterData.title: ParameterData
ParameterData.description: Weather data for a single parameter across all requested locations.

parameter.description: Parameter code with unit (e.g. t_2m:C, precip_1h:mm, wind_speed_10m:ms).

CoordinateData.title: CoordinateData
CoordinateData.description: Time-series of weather values at a single location.

lat.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). At most 6 decimal places.

lon.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). At most 6 decimal places.

DateValue.title: DateValue
DateValue.description: A single time-stamped weather observation or forecast value.

date.description: UTC timestamp of the observation or forecast step.

value.description: Numeric value of the weather parameter in the requested unit. Null when data is unavailable for this point/time.
